title: Simplicity Arched
description: A huge upgrade to FPS, Ping, Input Lag, and a few more. Simplicity Arched Provides a few resource packs to improve the looks of your game as well!
body:
# Simplicity Arched
![Rate Graph of Before and After FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef08e898d728ed53656f40e9fdcbdae9f0c6b92d.png)

**_See Gallery for more charts_**
## Description: 
🚀 This is the Simplicity Arched (SA) modpack! Whether you have a fancy computer or a not-so-fancy one, we've got you covered. The picture above shows the diffrence between without and with Simplicity Arched, Without FPS are low and janky, with FPS are higher and smooth.

For Low-End computers: Imagine your game suddenly getting a superpower—up to 80-100+ extra FPS! That means smoother gameplay without sacrificing how cool your game looks.

For High-End computers: Ever felt frustrated with input delays, lag, or annoying ping issues? Say goodbye to those headaches! Our modpack fine-tunes your gaming setup for lightning-fast responses and zero lag.

Ready to level up your gaming experience? Dive in with our modpack and discover a whole new world of smooth, seamless gameplay.


<details>
<summary>✨Mods Used</summary>

## FAQ:


<details>
<summary>🧩Can I add my own mods?</summary>
  
Yes, infact I encurage you to add our own to the pack to fine-tune your gameplay. Note that the more mods you add the less the original modpack's intended function will actualy work. Some mods can interfere with the installed ones in the modpack without crashing the game with a imcompatiblity notice.
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>❔What is Simplicity Arched (SA) modpack?</summary>
  
- Simplicity Arched (SA) is a modpack designed to enhance gaming experiences for both low-end and high-end computers. It aims to optimize gameplay by improving FPS, reducing lag, and enhancing overall performance.

</details>

<details>
<summary>💾How does the modpack benefit low-end computers?</summary>

- For low-end computers, the modpack can provide up to 80-100+ extra FPS, resulting in smoother gameplay without compromising visual quality.

</details>

<details>
<summary>💽How does the modpack benefit high-end computers?</summary>

- High-end computers can benefit from reduced input delays, lag, and ping issues, leading to lightning-fast responses and a lag-free gaming experience.

</details>

<details>
<summary>👎Will using this modpack affect my gameplay experience negatively in any way?</summary>

- While the modpack is designed to enhance performance, individual experiences may vary depending on factors such as hardware specifications and compatibility with other mods on the client that are not in the modpack.

</details>

<details>
<summary>🌄Will this modpack ever me for Quilt or other mod loader types?</summary>

- **No.** That requires all the mods in this project to be that mod loader type. Even if every project had Forge or Quilt I still would not, I like to use fabric over most loaders and I dont like testing mod that arent fabric.

</details>



## Performance Settings
- Vsync: Vsync should be off unless you have a 80Hz+ refresh rate on your computer and arent planning on haveing to many other apps open.
 
- Max Frame Rate: The max frame rate should be set to 100-180 on low end computers, on higher pcs, use 150-Unlimited
 
- Distances: Render Distance, Simulation Distance, and Entity Distance should be all be set to the same, any numebr is fine but just remember this can serverly effect the modpack's main purpose. I recommend 5-10 on low end and 7-Max on Higher end
 
- Resource packs: Use fast better grass to improve your expirence, no other packs are required unless you want them for looks, exept, bare bones if your comfortable with using it, it does give a extra 5-15 fps on some devices.


_Thanks to the mod creators for making these mods and a huge thanks to modrinth staff who keep this site up._
